LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS BRENDA CHEATHAM, MARCIE COHEN'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-522801 WITH CASE CGC-12-517010 IS GRANTED FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. BOTH CASES ARISE OUT OF THE SAME AUTOMOBILE ACCIDENT. THE COURT GRANTS CONSOLIDATION FOR TRIAL PURPOSES. THE PARTIES ARE ALSO ORDERED TO COORDINATE DISCOVERY AND OTHER MOTION PRACTICE. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-522801 WITH CASE CGC-12-517010
Off Calendar Apr-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BRENDA CHEATHAM, MARCIE COHEN'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-522801 WITH CASE CGC-12-517010 is granted for good cause shown. Both cases arise out of the same automobile accident. The Court grants consolidation for trial purposes. The parties are also ordered to coordinate discovery and other motion practice. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
